primary_catalyst.description: Broad semiconductor and AI software sell-off continues. AMD's Q1 forecast underwhelmed, sending AMD -17% and dragging the sector. Chip selloff extended into day 2 post-OpenAI news; bull-bear debate over AI capex ROI intensified.

secondary_catalysts.description: Seeking Alpha: 'Semiconductor and AI software stocks see red amid tech stock selloff'

force_attributions.rationale: AMD Q1 guide miss and -17% drop dragged entire AI chip complex; competitive concerns spilled over
AI capex ROI debate intensified â€” 'indiscriminate selloff' per BofA's Arya
Correlated dumping across AI beta; SaaS crash narrative

notes: Day 2 of the early-February chip selloff. Large intraday range (vol_z +1.46) confirms active institutional repositioning.
